verses.1: Oh that you would tear the heavens,
verses.2: as when fire kindles the brushwood,
verses.3: When you did awesome things which we didn’t look for,
verses.4: For from of old men have not heard,
verses.5: You meet him who rejoices and does righteousness,
verses.6: For we have all become like one who is unclean,
verses.7: There is no one who calls on your name,
verses.8: But now, LORD, you are our Father.
verses.10: Your holy cities have become a wilderness.
verses.11: Our holy and our beautiful house where our fathers praised you
verses.12: Will you hold yourself back for these things, LORD?
